list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Remove default Next.js boilerplate code and assets
Deleted the default global styles, layout, homepage, and favicon provided by Next.js to prepare for custom implementation. This cleanup ensures a blank starting point for the project.

task.summary:
Add VCS configuration for IntelliJ IDEA project
This commit introduces a vcs.xml file to configure Git as the version control system for the project in IntelliJ IDEA. This ensures proper integration and tracking of version control directly within the IDE.

Remove default Next.js boilerplate code and assets
Deleted the default global styles, layout, homepage, and favicon provided by Next.js to prepare for custom implementation. This cleanup ensures a blank starting point for the project.

MESSAGE.value:
Add VCS configuration for IntelliJ IDEA project
This commit introduces a vcs.xml file to configure Git as the version control system for the project in IntelliJ IDEA. This ensures proper integration and tracking of version control directly within the IDE.

Remove default Next.js boilerplate code and assets
Deleted the default global styles, layout, homepage, and favicon provided by Next.js to prepare for custom implementation. This cleanup ensures a blank starting point for the project.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Remove default Next.js boilerplate code and assets
Deleted the default global styles, layout, homepage, and favicon provided by Next.js to prepare for custom implementation. This cleanup ensures a blank starting point for the project.
